title: Group by Function - Reordering
excerpt: I love the new group by function that was released, but are we not allowed to reorder the groups like you can with the groups that you can create on the boards?

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the new group by function that was released, but are we not allowed to reorder the groups like you can with the groups that you can create on the boards?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Dominique! The Group By function does not currently support reordering groups.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here

posts.author: mclochet (MARIE-CLAIRE LOCHET)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Our Monday rep put us on the waiting list since last May, we would love to try out the Group-By feature.

posts.author: mclochet (MARIE-CLAIRE LOCHET)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the quick turnaround! We are excited to use the feature and will revert back to our Monday rep. Karina with our feedback!

posts.author: IsaMay (Isa)
posts.cookedHtml: A bit late to the game but @malia.monday I second the wish for being able to shuffle/sort the groups

posts.author: NancyG (Nancy Goldstein)
posts.cookedHtml: All of our boards have multiple groups. The Group-By function is relatively useless to us as is for the whole board. It would be a great feature for us if we could “group-by” within our task groups only.
